title: We Are Placed In New URAP Report with Our Studies In Pyhsic
content:
Student

News

Details

Date: 27 May 2019

We Are Placed In New URAP Report with Our Studies In Pyhsic

Doğuş University has showed its difference and has left a lot of state and private universities behind in new URAP (University Ranking by Academic Performance) Report in which the universities in special to Turkey have been ranked. URAP which is a non-profit unit working in ‘Informatics Institute of Middle Eastern Technical University’, in its report, has evaluated universities by taking 105 different scientific fields into consideration. According to Academic Ranking of World Universities (ARWU), Doğuş University which has gotten into the list due to the studies in the field of physics has been placed in 201-300th rank among the best 1.000 universities. In USNEWS ranking in the same report, it has also been recorded as the 369th university among the world’s best 1000 universities.

URAP that works for the purpose of developing scientific methods in order to evaluate academic success of higher education institutions and sharing the result of the completed studies with public, in the report on 26th February, 2019, had evaluated the rankings of Turkish Universities in the world general for 2018. In the report announced, Doğuş University had ranked as the third best university among İstanbul Universities which have no medical faculties
